metadata.title: Usama Labanieh | Data Analyst Portfolio
metadata.description: Data-focused professional — data analysis, dashboards, and stakeholder reporting. Python, SQL, Excel, and BI tools.

hero.typed: Data-focused professional — analysis, dashboards, and stakeholder reporting. Python, SQL, Excel, and BI.
hero.bio: Data-focused professional with hands-on experience in data analysis, dashboard development, and stakeholder reporting. Strong foundation in Python, SQL, Excel, and BI tools, with proven ability to clean, analyze, and visualize data to deliver actionable insights. Seeking an entry-level data-focused role where analytical and problem-solving skills can drive measurable business impact.

items.title: Business Analyst (MIS)
bullets: Built and maintained dynamic dashboards for cross-functional teams to track KPIs, productivity metrics, and support root cause analysis.
Developed tailored data solutions in Google Sheets and SQL — covering data cleansing, manipulation, analysis, and visualization — to inform strategic decision-making.
Contributed to a centralized MIS across five client projects in Marketing, E-Commerce, and Online Payments, improving data accessibility and reporting efficiency.

items.title: Data Specialist
bullets: Delivered end-to-end data analysis and machine learning projects using Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI — covering data collection, cleaning, EDA, and classical ML workflows (regression, classification).
Designed interactive dashboards and visualizations to track KPIs, surface trends, and translate analytical findings into clear, business-focused recommendations.
Applied statistical methods and root-cause analysis to support data-driven decision-making, with introductory exposure to deep learning, computer vision, and NLP.
Managed full project lifecycles independently, from problem definition and data validation through to model packaging and presentation of results.
Communicated insights effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences, adapting outputs and storytelling to stakeholder needs.

items.title: Senior Quality Assurance Analyst
bullets: Tracked and drove team performance through feedback, case studies, action plans, and root-cause analysis to uphold quality and customer experience standards.
Analyzed key metrics and shared findings with stakeholders in regular business reviews to inform growth strategies and improvement initiatives.
Created business reports and dashboards using Excel, Power BI, Tableau, and SharePoint, with hands-on experience in CRM tools and marketing analytics.
Supported project implementation by establishing workflows, guidance, and ensuring compliance with Security and Data Protection policies.

certifications.title: Microsoft Excel: Advanced Excel Formulas & Functions
GDPR and Data Protection Act Training

formal.title: Baccalaureate Certificate (Bachillerato) in Humanities and Social Sciences
formal.org: IES Antonio Buero Vallejo – Guadalajara, Spain

items.title: Utrecht Housing Price Predictor
items.description: Comparative machine learning on structured housing features in Utrecht. Regression models are benchmarked for predictive accuracy and interpretability, with a focus on sound validation and clear comparison of approaches.

items.title: Coffee Shop Sales
items.description: Interactive Excel dashboard for a New York coffee chain: transaction-level views of sales trends, busy periods, and product mix—built to surface practical insights for day-to-day decisions.

items.title: Road Accident Analysis
items.description: Power BI dashboard on UK road casualties (2021–2022): explore geography, time of day, vehicle type, severity, and conditions in one place for safety and pattern analysis.

items.title: Covid-19
items.description: SQL data preparation plus Tableau storytelling on global COVID-19 metrics: trends, comparisons, and forecast-oriented views built from curated public health data.

items.title: Pizza Sales
items.description: SQL-to-Power BI pipeline for a pizza restaurant: cleansed queries feed a manager-friendly dashboard covering sales performance, categories, and time-based patterns.

items.title: Restaurant Sales Analysis
items.description: Order-pattern analysis for Balaji, an Indian fast-food brand: Excel and SQL for cleaning and exploration, then pricing- and menu-oriented insights from customer behaviour and sales trends (1k+ orders).

items.title: Rollercoaster Exploratory Data Analysis
items.description: Python and Pandas EDA on 1,000+ rollercoasters (Wikipedia-sourced data): cleaning, distributions of speed, height, and launch years, location-based comparisons, and visuals in a Jupyter Notebook workflow.

items.title: Nashville Housing — SQL Data Cleaning
items.description: SQL-focused cleaning of Nashville, USA property listings: standardizing dates, filling and splitting addresses, handling duplicates, and trimming unused columns—documented as repeatable transformation steps.

items.title: World Layoffs (MySQL)
items.description: MySQL project on tech-industry layoffs (2020–March 2023): staging tables, deduplication, standardization of text and dates, then exploratory analysis of companies, industries, countries, and rolling totals over time.

items.title: Fassos Rolls — SQL
items.description: SQL analytics on fictional roll-delivery operations inspired by a Faasos-style brand: schema design, order and product metrics, driver performance, and delivery-time patterns across customers and shifts.

items.title: FIFA World Cup 2022 — Prediction Model
items.description: Python simulation of the 2022 World Cup: Wikipedia scraping for historical results and fixtures, team strength from past performance and goals, match outcome simulation, and a data-driven tournament winner prediction.

contact.title: Open Channel

contact.messageReceived: Your message was received. Usama’s inbox has been notified.
contact.successConfirmationNote: A professional acknowledgement has also been sent to your email.
contact.successDelivered: Your message was delivered to Usama.
contact.successNoCopy: The automatic copy to your inbox could not be sent (check spam or provider limits).
contact.modalSuccessConfirm: Check your inbox for a confirmation email.
contact.modalNoConfirm: Confirmation email could not be sent.

errors.network: Network error — check your connection. If you are offline or the server stopped, try again.
errors.notConfigured: Email is not configured (missing API keys on the server).

inbound.intro: Someone reached out through your portfolio. You can reply directly to this email — your reply will go to them.
inbound.siteLine: This was sent from your website’s contact form ({url}).
inbound.siteLineNoUrl: This was sent from your website’s contact form.

confirmation.subject: Thanks — your note: {subject} · Usama Labanieh
confirmation.preheader: Your message was delivered. This is an automated acknowledgement.
confirmation.body1: Thank you for your message. This email confirms that your inquiry was received and routed successfully. A copy of your subject line and an excerpt of your note appear below for your records.
confirmation.body2: I review incoming messages regularly and will reply directly to this address when I have an update. If your request is urgent, please indicate that in a follow-up message.
confirmation.footerNote: Automated acknowledgement — for your records. A personal reply will follow separately if your message requires one.
confirmation.textHeader: Usama Labanieh — Data analysis · Reporting · Portfolio
confirmation.textThanks: Thank you for your message. This confirms that your inquiry was received.
confirmation.textReply: I will reply to your email address when I have an update.

errors.noApiKey: Add RESEND_API_KEY to .env.local (see .env.example), then restart the dev server.
errors.sendFailed: Could not send message. Check Resend domain / from-address settings.
